welcomeMessage: Welcome to Extension API Agent! You can call EDA extension API functions through natural language or voice.
inputPlaceholder: Enter your request, e.g.: get current selected component info, or type a tool function name directly
apiLogCleared: API call log has been cleared
systemReady: System is ready. You can start a conversation or use voice input.
browserNoVoiceSupport: Browser does not support voice recognition
browserNoVoiceFeature: Browser does not support voice recognition feature
voiceNotAvailable: Voice recognition feature is not available
configureApiKey: Please configure API key in settings first
requestAbortedByUser: Request has been aborted by user
callSuccessClickDetails: Call succeeded - click to view details
callFailedClickDetails: Call failed - click to view details
toolResultsPrompt:
Based on tool call results, please reply to the user in natural language. Tool call results:
${1}
systemPrompt:
You are the AI assistant for EasyEDA Pro, specialized in helping users use EDA extension API.

Available tools:
${1}

When the user needs to call a tool, use the following format:
TOOL_CALL: {"name": "tool_name", "params": {param_object}}

If you need to call multiple tools at once, use multiple TOOL_CALL markers, for example:
TOOL_CALL: {"name": "tool_1", "params": {param_object_1}}
Some text here...
TOOL_CALL: {"name": "tool_2", "params": {param_object_2}}

Important rules:
1. Only use tools when the user explicitly needs to call EDA functions
2. Do not fabricate or assume tool call results
3. If unsure about user intent, ask for clarification first
4. Keep answers concise and avoid lengthy explanations
5. Support Markdown formatted replies
